coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 46-node closure.
validation: The authored no-control output has exact topology and local bounds. Fill Curve now welds adjacent cyclic tangent duplicates created by Limit Radius, correcting the previous +8 vertex / +4 face delta after extrusion. PRINT VIZ JUN2024 stores the fixed red col field and assigns Filament PLA .02 mm layer height to all 905 faces; it does not slice the mesh. Authored mode uses surface-only framing and hides the 2,724-segment unbeveled guide only from the Blender comparison. The aligned result reaches 0.9967 silhouette IoU, 0.43-pixel corner RMSE, 0.0414 macro luminance MAE, 0.7685 macro correlation, and -0.0074 mean-luminance error.
